mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, PASSWORD, TEL, TEL_LAST4, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, PASSWORD, TEL, TEL_LAST4, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, TEL_LAST4, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE 1=1
AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TEL_LAST4 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY MEMBER_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM MEMBER WHERE 1=1
AND MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TEL_LAST4 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM, PASSWORD, TEL, TEL_LAST4, EMAIL, USE_YN, REG_DT FROM MEMBER WHERE PASSWORD NOT LIKE '$2a$%' OR (TEL IS NOT NULL AND TEL != '' AND TEL LIKE '0%')
